title: Here Are Our Predictions in 12 Key 2026 Grammy Races, Including All 6 General Field Categories
text:
Song of the Year Prediction

Billboard's Pick: "Golden"

Front-runners: The three presumed frontrunners are "APT." (Bruno Mars & ROSÉ), "Golden" (from the K-pop film), and "Luther" (Kendrick Lamar & SZA).

Key Analysis:

Billboard suggests "Golden" has a strategic advantage because it's "easier to hum when the voter is filling out his ballot," compared to the more cinematic "Luther." Additionally, the publication notes that this K-pop track is vying to become the first song from that genre to win in this category.

The article also highlights that both "APT." and "Luther" feature exceptionally high songwriter counts (nine and ten credited writers respectively), which would set records if either wins. "Luther" notably samples classic soul recordings, honoring multiple generations of artists in its sample credits.
